data.title: IAM Policies
data.description: Uses Identity and Access Management to control user permissions and resources access.
data.technical_spec: Detailed role-based access controls with compliance checks.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures data protection with encryption both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes SSL/TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Implements strategies to protect against Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Multi-layered defense system with automated traffic filtering.

data.title: Compliance and Auditing
data.description: Regular compliance checks to adhere to relevant security standards.
data.technical_spec: Adheres to ISO, PCI DSS, GDPR regulations, among others.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: Employs AI and machine learning to detect and neutralize security threats.
data.technical_spec: Real-time analytics and threat intelligence integration.
